meta.githubCommitMessage:
feat: remove auth guards for open navigation

Replaces AdminProtected, ClientProtected, and BarberProtected with
passthrough components and removes the auth_required redirect in
App.jsx so all routes render without login for review and demos.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: ensure session is set before retrieving user data on login

After signInWithPassword succeeds, explicitly call setSession() with the
returned session data to ensure the client is properly authenticated before
calling getUser(). This eliminates the race condition where getUser() would
return null due to session not being immediately available.

Also updated both login and signup flows to use the user data returned from
signIn() instead of calling getUser() again, reducing unnecessary API calls.

Fixes blank login form reappearing after form submission.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

usage patterns, auth flow, data fetching conventions, and UI guidelines
to help AI assistants work effectively in this codebase.
